metadata.title: Prambanan Digital | Top Software House in Bandung
metadata.description: Prambanan Digital is a premier software house based in Bandung, Indonesia. We provide custom software, web & mobile apps, and enterprise solutions for Real Estate, Cafe, Agriculture, and Government sectors.
metadata.keywords: Software House Bandung, Web Development, Mobile Apps, Tech Agency Indonesia, Custom Software, IT Consultant, Cafe Management System, Property CRM, Smart Farming, Enterprise Solutions

hero.subtitle: We build custom software that drives real business results. Pay only for the features you need — no bloat, no waste. From concept to launch, we deliver on time and on budget.

about.heading: About Us
about.description: Prambanan Digital is a software development company dedicated to realizing your vision at the right price. We offer a pay-as-you-go model, allowing you to invest only in the features you need, saving time and resources by avoiding unnecessary development.
about.missionDescription: To empower businesses of all sizes with affordable, high-quality custom software solutions that drive measurable growth and operational efficiency.
about.visionDescription: To be Indonesia's most trusted software development partner, known for delivering exceptional value, transparent pricing, and lasting client relationships.

testimonials.heading: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Trusted by Growing Businesses
testimonials.subtitle: Hear what our clients have to say about working with Prambanan Digital.

items.name: Ahmad Rizky
items.quote: Prambanan Digital delivered our company website exactly as we envisioned. The team was responsive, professional, and truly understood our brand identity.

items.name: Dewi Sartika
items.quote: The meeting management system they built has transformed how our department operates. Seamless integration and exceptional attention to detail.

items.name: Budi Santoso
items.quote: Working with Prambanan Digital on our smart farming app was a game-changer. They understood the agricultural tech space and delivered a truly innovative solution.

faq.heading: FAQ
faq.title: Got Questions? We've Got Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about working with us.

items.question: How much does a custom software project cost?
items.answer: Our projects start from a competitive fixed price based on your specific requirements. We provide a detailed proposal with transparent pricing before starting — no hidden costs or surprises.

items.question: How long does it take to develop an application?
items.answer: Timelines vary by complexity. A standard web application typically takes 4-8 weeks, while more complex systems may take 3-6 months. We provide a clear timeline during our initial consultation.

items.question: Do you provide ongoing support after launch?
items.answer: Absolutely! We offer flexible maintenance and support packages to keep your software running smoothly, including bug fixes, feature updates, and performance monitoring.

items.question: Can you work with our existing tech stack?
items.answer: Yes. Our team has expertise across a wide range of technologies. We can integrate with your existing systems or recommend the best stack for your specific needs.

items.question: What is the 'Developer as a Service' model?
items.answer: DaaS gives you access to our skilled developers who work as an extension of your team. You get the talent you need without the overhead of full-time hires — scale up or down as your project demands.
